basics.title: The Basics
basics.country_hint: Affects currency и units across the app

privacy.title: Конфиденциальность
privacy.friends_only_desc: Only people you've linked with can see your profile.
privacy.everyone_desc: Anyone on Mingla can find you и see your profile.
privacy.nobody_desc: You're invisible. Нет one can see your profile — full ghost mode.
privacy.show_activity_on: Друзья can see what you've been up to lately.
privacy.show_activity_off: Your activity is hidden from everyone.

notifications.title: Нетtification Настройки
notifications.push_hint: Receive push notifications on your device
notifications.friends_pairing_hint: Друг requests, pair requests, и social updates
notifications.link_requests_hint: When someone wants to link profiles with you
notifications.sessions_hint: Пригласитьs, member updates, и board activity
notifications.tips_hint: Occasional nudges, weekly digest, и recommendations

quiet_hours.title: Quiet Hours
quiet_hours.label: Quiet Hours
quiet_hours.error_update: Failed to update quiet hours setting.

delete.title: The Red Zone
delete.warning: This permanently deletes your data, your boards, и your history. There's no undo.
delete.confirm_body: Deleting your account removes everything — your profile, boards, links, и activity. This can't be reversed.
delete.deleting_title: We're sad to see you go
delete.deleting_body: Packing up your things и sweeping the floors.
delete.deleting_sub: This takes a moment. Hang tight.
delete.success_body: You're always welcome back. We'll leave the light on.
delete.success_sub: Signing you out now. Until next time.
delete.error_default: Что-то пошло не так. Please try again.
delete.error_must_sign_in: You must be signed in to delete your account.
delete.error_timeout: This is taking longer than expected. Your account may already be deleted — try closing и reopening the app.

pickers.birthday_future: День рождения can't be in the future.

country_confirm_body: Changing to {{country}} will update your currency to {{currency}} ({{symbol}}) и units to {{measurement}}. Продолжить?
error_update: Failed to update. Please try again.
